case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. RUSSELL HALLEMANN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION ERNEST I. KNOWLES FILED RE: IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY FILED RE: IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION ANSON LOUIE FILED RE: COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HALLEMANN, RUSSELL POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: CLAAS 260 ROLLANT SN# 76500055, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $17,058.55 DAMAGES, $2,050.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $365.00 COSTS, $162.62 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,636.17, WHICH EQUIPMENT COLLECTIVELY HAS A FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $20,000.00. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-03-2009, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT HALLEMANN, RUSSELL DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-03-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-02-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-19-2009
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT HALLEMANN, RUSSELL
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $365.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT HALLEMANN, RUSSELL
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED DEC-26-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HALLEMANN, RUSSELL
DECLARATION MARK SCHICKENDANTZ FILED RE: EQUIPMENT VALUATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE
